title: Echo Chest Experience Obliterator
description: Removes experience-related functionality from the Echo Chest mod.
body: This mod removes the glass bottle slot's functionality and the experience bar tooltip from the Echo Chest's UI, so as to allow Echo Chests to be used in modpacks where experience is unobtainable. This mod does nothing when [Echo Chest](https://modrinth.com/mod/echo-chest) is not installed, and does not change the UI of the Echo Chest on its own; you'll have to do that with the use of a resource pack and a mod like Slotify/Polytone that lets you modify the position of the slots inside of the Echo Chest's UI. (Honestly this mod could've been packaged inside of Raspberry Core, but it was made before that mod's inception. So it goes!)
